meta.name: Pet Paradise
meta.description: A bright, friendly, and vibrant e-commerce store focused on pet supplies and services. The design uses a clean white background with bold primary blue accents, rounded shapes for an approachable feel, and rich, colorful photography to engage users.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.display: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
fonts.serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Header contains a top bar with search, utility links, and cart. Below it is a secondary navigation bar with category dropdowns. A green promotional banner sits below the header. The search bar is prominently centered.

footer.notes: A blue contact banner precedes the main white footer. The footer includes utility links, app download buttons, pharmacy accreditation badges, and standard copyright/legal links.

productCard.notes: Cards have a subtle border and shadow. They include product image, brand name, title, star rating, price, promotional text, and an outlined 'Add to Cart' button.

productGrid.notes: The product grid section has a featured promotional card spanning two columns on the left, followed by standard product cards. A horizontal scroll arrow indicates more products.

featuredProducts.heading: Meet Chewy Made
featuredProducts.notes: A distinct section combining a lifestyle brand image and text with a horizontal scrolling grid of specific brand products.

sections.name: announcement-bar

content.headline: Generic promotional offer statement
content.specialElements: Floating promotional banner bar at top

sections.notes: Sits directly below the main navigation.

sections.name: promotional-hero
sections.layout: Full-width container with rounded corners and centered content overlay

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph with integrated central graphic panel
design.text: White primary text, bold display font

content.headline: Major promotional offer headline
content.cta: Single vibrant green button, slightly rounded corners

media.description: Pets in an outdoor setting with product packaging integrated into the scene

sections.notes: Hero banner is contained within a rounded rectangle, not edge-to-edge on larger screens.

sections.name: quick-actions
sections.layout: Flexbox row, horizontally centered within a rounded container

design.styling: Rounded corners, moderate padding, evenly spaced items

content.headline: Greeting text
content.cta: Single primary blue button next to greeting

sections.notes: Acts as a quick dashboard or personalized entry point.

sections.name: shop-by-pet

content.headline: Category prompt question
content.specialElements: Right navigation arrow for horizontal scroll

sections.notes: Visual navigation based on user's primary interest.

sections.name: membership-banner
sections.layout: Full-width container, text right, image left

design.background: Solid light grey (#f4f4f4) with subtle pattern

content.headline: Membership program value proposition
content.cta: Single bright pink button, fully rounded/pill

media.description: Playful illustration of pets and brand elements

sections.notes: Promotes a subscription or loyalty program.

sections.name: popular-categories

design.styling: Circular icon containers with light blue backgrounds, equal spacing

sections.notes: Secondary category navigation using illustrated icons rather than photography.

sections.name: featured-product-split
sections.layout: 2-column split, ~50/50, contained in a single rounded box

design.background: Split background: vibrant pink left, solid primary blue right

content.headline: Product introduction headline
content.cta: Single white button, dark text, slightly rounded corners

media.description: Hands holding fresh product packaging on pink background

sections.notes: High contrast, visually striking section for a new product launch.

sections.name: secondary-promotional-hero
sections.layout: Full-width container, similar to main hero but shorter height

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph with integrated central graphic panel

media.description: Pets in outdoor setting with products

sections.notes: Reinforces an offer presented earlier or introduces a related one.

sections.name: services-features
sections.layout: CSS grid 4 equal columns with gap

design.styling: Cards with very light blue backgrounds and rounded corners

media.description: Mix of app mockups, expert portraits, and service graphics

sections.name: product-grid-showcase
sections.layout: Featured vertical card on left (spanning 2 columns), standard product cards on right, horizontal scroll

design.styling: Rounded container enclosing the grid, individual white product cards with borders

content.headline: Brand collection title
content.body: Short descriptive text for the collection
content.cta: Text link with arrow for the collection, individual 'Add to Cart' buttons on products

media.description: Lifestyle image of dog catching treat for the featured card, isolated product shots for the grid

sections.notes: Effectively groups products under a specific brand or theme.

sections.name: brand-promotional-banner

design.background: Lifestyle image with soft gradient fade to solid color

content.headline: Brand specific aspirational statement
content.cta: Single dark blue button, slightly rounded corners

media.description: Dog face and specific brand packaging

sections.notes: Co-branded or specific brand highlight section.
